scratch_mirror.note: 45-day purge clock — last known activity 2026-06-18 (job 221335 era); mirror still present 2026-07-24; touch-refresh or re-verify immediately before dispatch

sinfo_2026_07_24.a30: up; 1 node mixed + 1 node reserved; gpu:nvidia_a30:2 per node (~2 GPUs schedulable)
sinfo_2026_07_24.h100: up; mixed; nvidia_h100_80gb_hbm3:4 + h100_nvl:1 + h100_nvl_3g.47gb:4 (virtual slices — do not use slices)
sinfo_2026_07_24.queue_note: fairshare < 0.5 -> expect nontrivial PD wait on a30 (only ~2 physical GPUs free); fallback = h100 partition (physical 80GB cards) if PD(Resources) persists

task2_cost_block.envelope: [U-06] §(e) B2: single GPU, <=12 hr primary run + one seed-repeat contingency

partition_choice.choice: a30 (physical partition; NOT a30-2.12gb/a30-4.6gb virtual slices)

vram_arithmetic.model_static_fp32: 5.5M params: weights 22 MB + grads 22 MB + AdamW moments 44 MB = ~0.09 GB
vram_arithmetic.activations_per_example: 0.4–1.0 GB with autograd at 64^3 input, 4-level base-32 U-Net (spec §memory arithmetic; level-1 map 33.5 MB/retained tensor)
vram_arithmetic.batch_16: ~6.5–16 GB peak -> fits A30 24 GB with headroom at the mid estimate
vram_arithmetic.batch_32: ~13–32 GB peak -> pessimistic end EXCEEDS 24 GB; not the default
vram_arithmetic.ruling: batch 16 primary on A30; raise to 32 only after a measured peak at batch 16 shows < 11 GB

partition_choice.h100_rationale: not needed — 5.5M-param model is compute-light and the run fits the 12 hr envelope on A30; H100 is queue-fallback only
partition_choice.cpu_mem: --mem=32G explicit (never rely on 64G default per skill)

hrs_per_run.throughput_anchor: s3 smoke: 1–3 s/step at batch 4 on MPS fp32; A30 fp32 at batch 16 estimated 0.2–0.5 s/step
hrs_per_run.estimate: ~50k-step production run: 2.8–7 hr; planning figure 4–8 hr

cost_accounting.basis: Juno is allocation-based (no dollar rate); costs stated in GPU-hr against the quota granted 2026-05-12 (user-confirmed; nerf LEDGER §4 2026-05-12 entry; grant was sized against the ~792 GPU-hr T4 envelope)
cost_accounting.seed_repeat_contingency: <= 12 A30 GPU-hr (one run, different seed, same config)

task2_cost_block.auto_stop: sbatch --time=12:00:00 (SLURM hard kill) + in-script max_steps bound; PCV copy-out ordered BEFORE cleanup so a time-kill after first checkpoint still preserves artifacts

artifact_lifecycle.copy_in: repo src/experiments/scripts + pyproject/uv.lock from ~/work -> ~/scratch RUN_DIR; sherwood via symlink to warm mirror
artifact_lifecycle.copy_out_pcv: hard-fail asserts ([[ -d ]] || exit N; NO '2>/dev/null || true' on artifact paths) for: (1) best checkpoint *.pt, (2) MLflow file-store dir, (3) metrics CSV -> ~/work/stage2_results/<RUN_TAG>/
artifact_lifecycle.cleanup: rm -rf RUN_DIR only after PCV passes; nothing persists on scratch post-job (45-day purge discipline per juno-hpc skill)
artifact_lifecycle.host_roundtrip: rsync juno:~/work/stage2_results/<RUN_TAG>/ -> cloud_runs/<RUN_TAG>/ (wrap in caffeinate -is); replay MLflow file-store into local tracker; DVC-track checkpoint (>10 MB rule); LEDGER §6 entry
artifact_lifecycle.downstream_consumable_gate: sweep not 'done' until the host-side G2/corrected-metric evaluator loads the pulled checkpoint and produces a non-trivial readout (PCV stage-gate)

pre_dispatch_checklist: re-pin torch cu124 wheel if uv.lock changed since c6f3aed
